concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for the cockpit tab-model MVVM harness.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'models' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'views' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' RETURN type AS MvvmViewType

MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'MODEL' AND (type.name ENDS WITH 'TabModel' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'WindowModel') SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint RETURN type AS MvvmRootEntrypoint

constraint.description: Cockpit MVVM topology allows active view Java only in src/view/models or src/view/views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/models or src/view/views' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Active view Java must use the cockpit tab-model topology.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Component-local view buckets are migration debt and forbidden for active Java.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/models or src/view/views' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Legacy component-local View/ViewModel/api/assembly-style topology is not active target code.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: View contribution models are the only shell-facing model entrypoints.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'MODEL' AND NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND NOT (type.name ENDS WITH 'TabModel' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'WindowModel') RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, '*TabModel or *WindowModel' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Each file in src/view/models must be one shell contribution model.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each model source file owns exactly one top-level tab/window contribution model.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'}) WHERE NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level model type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A src/view/models file must define exactly one tab/window contribution model.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Passive panel views name their fixed shell surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND NOT ( type.name ENDS WITH 'ControlsView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'MainView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'DetailsView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'TopBarView' ) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, '*ControlsView, *MainView, *DetailsView, *StateView, or *TopBarView' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive view names must identify the shell surface they render.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each passive view source file owns exactly one top-level panel fragment.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level passive panel view type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A src/view/views file must define exactly one passive panel fragment.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: At least one shell contribution model must exist.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint) WITH count(root) AS rootCount WHERE rootCount = 0 RETURN 'src/view/models' AS Source, 'at least one shell contribution model' AS ExpectedDirection, 'none' AS ActualDirection, 'The shell needs discoverable contribution models.' AS Details

constraint.description: Passive panel views do not depend on shell contribution models.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE source.viewBucket = 'VIEW' AND target.viewBucket <> 'VIEW' RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'passive views may depend only on other passive views' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'src/view/views must remain passive and model-free.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Contribution models may bind passive views, use shell API, and call only domain public boundaries.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.host\\..*' OR (target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.api\\..*') OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.api\\..+' ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND NOT target.viewBucket IN ['MODEL', 'VIEW'] ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'shell.api, src/view/views, src/view/models, and domain public boundaries only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Contribution models must not depend on old view topology, data, bootstrap, shell internals, or domain internals.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
